question: How many movies are either part of the EON James Bond series or written by Phoebe Waller-Bridge?

pred: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:partOfSeries]->(fs:FilmSeries {name: 'EON James Bond'}) OR (m)-[:writtenBy]->(p:Person {name: 'Phoebe Waller-Bridge'}) RETURN COUNT(m)
